runTitle: Vercel Production QA - parity metadata after type-fix deploy
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production deploy readiness after streaming parity type fix

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after type-fix production QA; effective total 17.2913 USD and billed cost 0.0000.

artifacts.label: Production AI detail view after type-fix deploy still missing parity metadata block

completedImprovements.title: Streaming parity deferred metadata type mismatch fix builds on production
completedImprovements.evidence: Vercel production deployment dpl_ANeQLU3AwWoRoZBN8P9BDUYfKgWB reached READY for commit 55959a002 after the previous 8adffda12 build failure.

pendingImprovements.title: 프론트엔드 표시 상태와 AI 분석 상태 동일 슬롯 참조 검증
pendingImprovements.note: After commit 55959a002 and production deployment dpl_ANeQLU3AwWoRoZBN8P9BDUYfKgWB reached READY, dashboard slot label and /api/health?service=parity still aligned, but a fresh streaming AI answer for cache-redis-dc1-01 memory usage still rendered only '데이터: 일반 대화 응답 / 엔진: Streaming AI' in the analysis detail without the parity metadata contract block.

notes: Verified the previous Vercel build blocker from commit 8adffda12 was removed: deployment dpl_ANeQLU3AwWoRoZBN8P9BDUYfKgWB for commit 55959a002 reached READY and was promoted to openmanager-ai.vercel.app.
Verified /dashboard rendered 'Synthetic OTel snapshot · 14:10 KST (slot 85/143)' after the new deployment became active.

Verified /api/health?service=parity returned globalSlotIndex=84 slightly before the query and the dashboard later advanced to slot 85 as the 10-minute boundary changed, which is within the documented tolerance window.
Verified a fresh AI sidebar query 'cache-redis-dc1-01 메모리 사용률 몇 %야?' returned a successful streaming answer on production after the Cloud Run fallback fix and frontend type-fix deployment.

Observed that '분석 근거 상세 보기' still shows only generic data/engine labels and does not render the parity metadata contract block for the new streaming response, so the frontend-ai-data-parity-gate remains open.
